meta.title: Occupational Health Risk Assessment
meta.subtitle: SEG-based exposure assessment, OEL comparison & health-surveillance schedule
meta.author: HSE Operations — Occupational Health
meta.classification: Internal — special-category health data — competent-person (occupational hygienist / OH physician) review required
meta.deid_notice: All workers are referred to by similar-exposure-group (SEG) or role label. Surveillance and exposure-monitoring results are reported by SEG with <5 small-cell suppression; identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting and the re-identification key is held separately, not part of this document.

sections.text: This occupational-health risk assessment covers the named tasks/roles below, grouped into similar-exposure groups (SEGs) per ISO 45001 §6.1.2. Each SEG names the task/role and the agent it is exposed to; surveillance and exposure data are reported by SEG, never by individual.

items: Chemical / inhalation: agent, route, and the SEG exposed (measured or estimated basis stated).
Noise / vibration (HAV/WBV): measured dose vs the action level for the SEG.
Manual handling / ergonomics: the task scored with the named tool (see Ergonomic scores).

rows: UK Control of Noise at Work Regs 2005
sections.caption: Every exposure compared to a cited OEL/WEL/PEL with authority+year (KB-DATA-OEL-LIMITS / KB-DATA-EXPOSURE-LIMITS — the single OEL source).
RULA working — the ergonomics.to_report_blocks() [metrics, table] pair (engine output, not narrated).
Residual rated on risk_matrix after controls; a residual High/Critical triggers more controls, not 'accept and proceed'.

rows.control: Substitute an aqueous degreaser for the solvent
Acoustic enclosure on the press; LEV on the degrease line
Hearing protection + RPE as a backstop only

sections.text: Hearing protection and surveillance are NOT controls — substitution and engineering precede PPE and precede surveillance.

sections.caption: Cadence keyed to the cited OEL comparison (KB-SNIP-SURVEILLANCE-TRIGGERS); outcomes reported by SEG with <5 suppression.

rows.action: Install the acoustic enclosure on press line 2
Baseline audiometry for the press-shop SEG

sections.text: Decision-support only; a competent person (occupational hygienist / OH physician) must review and sign off this assessment. Review on exposure change or on a surveillance trigger. Regulatory basis: ISO 45001 §6.1.2 + the jurisdiction surveillance regime (COSHH / Control of Noise / Control of Vibration / OSHA 1910.95).
